name: Checkout Flow
description: Complete purchase/subscribe checkout process with payment form, promo codes, order summary, and success confirmation.

subscribe.description: Recurring tier subscription checkout with plan summary, payment form, and promo code input

purchase.description: One-time product purchase flow with order summary and payment method selection

upgrade.description: Tier upgrade flow showing current-vs-new plan comparison with prorated pricing

visual_brief: Two-column layout with an order summary card on the right and a payment form on the left. The summary card shows line items with names and prices, a promo code input field, subtotal, tax, and total in bold. The payment form includes radio buttons for payment method (card, PayPal), card number/expiry/CVC inputs with card brand icon detection, billing address fields, and a prominent submit button at the bottom. Subscribe preset adds plan name and billing cycle selector. Upgrade preset shows a comparison of current vs. new plan.

responsive.mobile: Single column layout — order summary moves above the payment form. Submit button is full-width and sticky at the bottom. Card inputs stack vertically.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout maintained. Summary panel is narrower. Payment form takes majority width.
responsive.desktop: Standard two-column layout with comfortable spacing. Summary card is sticky within its column on scroll.

composition.PaymentForm: Form(d-surface, flex-col) > [MethodSelect > Radio(d-control)[] + CardInputs > [NumberInput + ExpiryInput + CVCInput] + BillingAddress + SubmitButton(d-interactive, variant: primary, full-width)]
composition.OrderSummary: Card(d-surface, sticky) > [LineItems > LineItem[] + PromoInput?(d-control) + Subtotal + Tax + Total(heading3, font-bold)]
